title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
